name: Dingle Berry Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together.
2. Roll into balls about the size of a walnut.
3. Melt 1/2 cake of paraffin and 1 (6 ounce) package of semi-sweetened chocolate chips over hot water.
4. Place a toothpick in each ball and dip in chocolate.
5. Place on wax paper.
